zh_CN.Select a directory which contains the co: 选择一个包含漫画文件的目录
zh_CN.Imported @a comics, loaded @b pages, rec: 已导入 @a 部漫画, 加载 @b 页, 接收到 @c 部漫画
zh_CN.Click if login expired: 点击此处如果登录已过期
zh_CN.Show local favorites before network favo: 在网络收藏之前显示本地收藏
zh_CN.Display mode of comic tile: 漫画缩略图的显示模式
zh_CN.Show favorite status on comic tile: 在漫画缩略图上显示收藏状态
zh_CN.Show history on comic tile: 在漫画缩略图上显示历史记录
zh_CN.The number of pic in screen for landscap: 横屏同屏幕图片数量(仅画廊模式)
zh_CN.The number of pic in screen for portrait: 竖屏同屏幕图片数量(仅画廊模式)
zh_CN.Venerassr is a free and open-source app: Venera是一个免费的开源漫画阅读应用。
zh_CN.Select a directory which contains the co: 选择一个包含漫画文件夹的目录
zh_CN.Select an archive file (cbz, zip, 7z, cb: 选择一个归档文件 (cbz, zip, 7z, cb7)
zh_CN.Name: 名称
长按并拖动以重新排序。
zh_CN.When using Continuous(Top to Bottom) mod: 当使用连续（从上到下）模式
zh_CN.When sync data, skip certain setting fie: 同步时跳过指定设置项，这些项不会被上传或覆盖。
可用的设置项名称详见源码。
zh_CN.Long press on the favorite button to qui: 长按收藏按钮快速添加到这个文件夹
zh_CN.Display time & battery info in reader: 在阅读器中显示时间和电量信息
zh_CN.Select an EhViewer database and a downlo: 选择EhViewer的下载数据（导出的db文件）与存放下载内容的目录
zh_CN.If you import an EhViewer's database, pr: 若通过EhViewer数据库导入漫画，程序将会按其中的下载标签自动创建收藏文件夹。
已添加 @count 本漫画到下载队列
zh_CN.Are you sure you want to clear your hist: 确定要清除您的历史记录吗？
zh_CN.Remove local favorite and history: 删除本地收藏和历史记录
zh_CN.Also remove files on disk: 同时删除磁盘上的文件
zh_CN.Copy to app local path: 将漫画复制到本地存储目录中
zh_CN.Delete all unavailable local favorite it: 删除所有无效的本地收藏
已删除 @a 条无效收藏
zh_CN.A new version is available. Do you want: 有新版本可用。您要现在更新吗？
zh_CN.The cover cannot be uncollected here: 封面不能在此取消收藏
zh_CN.On the image browsing page, you can quic: 在图片浏览页面, 你可以根据你的阅读模式横滑或者竖滑快速收藏图片
zh_CN.Calculate your favorite from @a comics a: 从 @a 本漫画和 @b 张图片中, 计算你最喜欢的
zh_CN.After the parentheses are the number of: 括号后是图片数量或图片数比漫画页数
zh_CN.The chapter order of the comic may have: 漫画的章节顺序可能发生了变化, 暂不支持收藏此章节
zh_CN.favoritesCompareComicPages: 收藏数与漫画页数比较
zh_CN.Title: 标题
zh_CN.The comic is invalid, please long press: 该漫画已失效, 请长按删除, 可以双击标题进行复制
已添加 @c 本漫画到下载队列
zh_CN.Select a directory which contains multip: 选择一个包含多个归档文件的目录
zh_CN.Clear specific reader settings for this: 清除该漫画的特殊阅读设置
zh_CN.A valid WebDav directory URL: 有效的 WebDav 目录 URL
选择文件夹以关注更新。
zh_CN.Do not report any issues related to sour: 请勿向应用仓库报告任何与漫画源相关的问题。
zh_CN.Do you want to mark all as read?: 是否将所有标记为已读？
zh_CN.Download model below to enable: 在下方下载模型以启用
zh_CN.Once the operation is successful, app wi: 操作成功后，应用将自动与服务器同步数据。
zh_CN.Refresh Completed: Success @success, Fai: 刷新完成：成功 @success，失败 @failed，跳过 @skipped
zh_CN.Select a local .onnx model to override t: 选择一个本地 .onnx 模型以覆盖内置模型
zh_CN.The app will check for updates at most o: 应用每天最多检查一次更新。
zh_CN.The colorization model is not downloaded: 上色模型未下载。请在上色设置中下载以启用 AI 上色。
zh_CN.The comic will be marked as no updates a: 漫画一旦阅读将被标记为无更新。
zh_CN.name: 名称

en_US.Select a directory which contains the co: Select a directory which contains the comic files.
en_US.Imported @a comics, loaded @b pages, rec: Imported @a comics, loaded @b pages, received @c comics
en_US.Show local favorites before network favo: Show local favorites before network favorites
en_US.Auto close favorite panel after operatio: Auto close favorite panel after operation
en_US.Show favorite status on comic tile: Show favorite status on comic tile
en_US.The number of pic in screen for landscap: The number of pic in screen for landscape (Only Gallery Mode)
en_US.The number of pic in screen for portrait: The number of pic in screen for portrait (Only Gallery Mode)
en_US.Venerassr is a free and open-source app: Venerassr is a free and open-source app for comic reading.
en_US.Select a directory which contains the co: Select a directory which contains the comic directories.
en_US.Select an archive file (cbz, zip, 7z, cb: Select an archive file (cbz, zip, 7z, cb7)
en_US.Name: Name
Long press and drag to reorder.
en_US.When using Continuous(Top to Bottom) mod: When using Continuous(Top to Bottom) mode
en_US.When sync data, skip certain setting fie: When sync data, skip certain setting fields, which means these won't be uploaded / override.
See source code for available fields.
en_US.Long press on the favorite button to qui: Long press on the favorite button to quickly add to this folder
en_US.Display time & battery info in reader: Display time & battery info in reader
en_US.Select an EhViewer database and a downlo: Select an EhViewer database and a download folder.
en_US.If you import an EhViewer's database, pr: If you import an EhViewer's database, program will automatically create folders according to the download label in that database.
en_US.Are you sure you want to clear your hist: Are you sure you want to clear your history?
en_US.Delete all unavailable local favorite it: Delete all unavailable local favorite items
en_US.A new version is available. Do you want: A new version is available. Do you want to update now?
en_US.Local comic collection is not supported: Local comic collection is not supported at present
en_US.The cover cannot be uncollected here: The cover cannot be uncollected here
en_US.On the image browsing page, you can quic: On the image browsing page, you can quickly collect images by sliding horizontally or vertically according to your reading mode
en_US.Calculate your favorite from @a comics a: Calculate your favorite from @a comics and @b images
en_US.After the parentheses are the number of: After the parentheses are the number of pictures or the number of pictures compared to the number of comic pages
en_US.The chapter order of the comic may have: The chapter order of the comic may have changed, temporarily not supported for collection
en_US.Title: Title
en_US.Update the page number by the latest col: Update the page number by the latest collection
en_US.The comic is invalid, please long press: The comic is invalid, please long press to delete, you can double click the title to copy
en_US.Select a directory which contains multip: Select a directory which contains multiple archive files.
en_US.Clear specific reader settings for this: Clear specific reader settings for this comic
Choose a folder to follow updates.
en_US.Do not report any issues related to sour: Do not report any issues related to sources to App repo.
en_US.Do you want to mark all as read?: Do you want to mark all as read?
en_US.Once the operation is successful, app wi: Once the operation is successful, app will automatically sync data with the server.
en_US.Select a local .onnx model to override t: Select a local .onnx model to override the built-in one
en_US.Show single image on first page: Show single image on first page
en_US.The app will check for updates at most o: The app will check for updates at most once a day.
en_US.The colorization model is not downloaded: The colorization model is not downloaded. Please download it in Colorization Settings to enable AI colorization.
en_US.The comic will be marked as no updates a: The comic will be marked as no updates as soon as you read it.
en_US.name: name
en_US.The URL should point to a 'index.json' f: The URL should point to a 'index.json' file

zh_TW.Select a directory which contains the co: 選擇一個包含漫畫文件的目錄
zh_TW.Imported @a comics, loaded @b pages, rec: 已導入 @a 部漫畫, 加載 @b 頁, 接收到 @c 部漫畫
zh_TW.Click if login expired: 點擊此處如果登錄已過期
zh_TW.Show local favorites before network favo: 在網絡收藏之前顯示本地收藏
zh_TW.Display mode of comic tile: 漫畫縮略圖的顯示模式
zh_TW.Show favorite status on comic tile: 在漫畫縮略圖上顯示收藏狀態
zh_TW.Show history on comic tile: 在漫畫縮略圖上顯示歷史記錄
zh_TW.The number of pic in screen for landscap: 橫屏同屏幕圖片數量(僅畫廊模式)
zh_TW.The number of pic in screen for portrait: 豎屏同屏幕圖片數量(僅畫廊模式)
zh_TW.Venerassr is a free and open-source app: Venera是一個免費的開源漫畫閱讀應用。
zh_TW.Select a directory which contains the co: 選擇一個包含漫畫文件夾的目錄
zh_TW.Select an archive file (cbz, zip, 7z, cb: 選擇一個歸檔文件 (cbz, zip, 7z, cb7)
zh_TW.Name: 名稱
長按並拖動以重新排序。
zh_TW.When using Continuous(Top to Bottom) mod: 當使用連續（從上到下）模式
zh_TW.When sync data, skip certain setting fie: 同步時跳過指定設置項，這些項不會被上傳或覆蓋。
可用的設置項名稱詳見源碼。
zh_TW.Long press on the favorite button to qui: 長按收藏按鈕快速添加到這個文件夾
zh_TW.Display time & battery info in reader: 在閱讀器中顯示時間和電量信息
zh_TW.Select an EhViewer database and a downlo: 選擇EhViewer的下載數據（導出的db文件）與存放下載內容的目錄
zh_TW.If you import an EhViewer's database, pr: 若通過EhViewer數據庫導入漫畫，程序將會按其中的下載標籤自動創建收藏文件夾。
已添加 @count 本漫畫到下載隊列
zh_TW.Are you sure you want to clear your hist: 確定要清除您的歷史記錄嗎？
zh_TW.Remove local favorite and history: 刪除本地收藏和歷史記錄
zh_TW.Also remove files on disk: 同時刪除磁盤上的文件
zh_TW.Copy to app local path: 將漫畫複製到本地存儲目錄中
zh_TW.Delete all unavailable local favorite it: 刪除所有無效的本地收藏
已刪除 @a 條無效收藏
zh_TW.A new version is available. Do you want: 有新版本可用。您要現在更新嗎？
zh_TW.The cover cannot be uncollected here: 封面不能在此取消收藏
zh_TW.On the image browsing page, you can quic: 在圖片瀏覽頁面, 你可以根據你的閱讀模式橫滑或者豎滑快速收藏圖片
zh_TW.Calculate your favorite from @a comics a: 從 @a 本漫畫和 @b 張圖片中, 計算你最喜歡的
zh_TW.After the parentheses are the number of: 括號後是圖片數量或圖片數比漫畫頁數
zh_TW.The chapter order of the comic may have: 漫畫的章節順序可能發生了變化, 暫不支持收藏此章節
zh_TW.favoritesCompareComicPages: 收藏數與漫畫頁數比較
zh_TW.Title: 標題
zh_TW.The comic is invalid, please long press: 該漫畫已失效, 請長按刪除, 可以雙擊標題進行複製
已添加 @c 本漫畫到下載隊列
zh_TW.Select a directory which contains multip: 選擇一個包含多個歸檔文件的目錄
zh_TW.Clear specific reader settings for this: 清除該漫畫的特殊閱讀設定
zh_TW.A valid WebDav directory URL: 有效的 WebDav 目錄 URL
選擇資料夾以關注更新。
zh_TW.Do not report any issues related to sour: 請勿向應用倉庫回報任何與漫畫源相關的問題。
zh_TW.Do you want to mark all as read?: 是否將所有標記為已讀？
zh_TW.Download model below to enable: 在下方下載模型以啟用
zh_TW.Once the operation is successful, app wi: 操作成功後，應用將自動與伺服器同步資料。
zh_TW.Refresh Completed: Success @success, Fai: 重新整理完成：成功 @success，失敗 @failed，跳過 @skipped
zh_TW.Select a local .onnx model to override t: 選擇一個本地 .onnx 模型以覆蓋內建模型
zh_TW.The app will check for updates at most o: 應用每天最多檢查一次更新。
zh_TW.The colorization model is not downloaded: 上色模型未下載。請在上色設定中下載以啟用 AI 上色。
zh_TW.The comic will be marked as no updates a: 漫畫一旦閱讀將被標記為無更新。
zh_TW.name: 名稱
